GPT-5.4 发布：重新评估你的选型策略

首个大一统前沿模型，原生计算机操控 + 百万上下文窗口

OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4，整合推理、编码、Agent 和计算机操控能力于一体，Tool Search 机制使 Agent 调用成本降低 47%，API 已开放，开发者应立即评估迁移价值。

GPT-5.4 Ships: Reassess Your LLM Strategy Now

OpenAI's unified model brings computer use, 1M context, and a pricing tradeoff

OpenAI released GPT-5.4, combining reasoning, coding, agents, and native computer use in one model. Tool Search cuts agent token usage by 47%, but input pricing rose 43% vs GPT-5.2. Evaluate before migrating.
85%
Confidence
$2.50 /1M tokens vs $5.00 /1M tokens
$15.00 /1M tokens vs $25.00 /1M tokens
▼ 继续阅读完整分析 ▼ Continue reading full analysis
2026-03-06 · 5 sources
发生了什么
What Happened
2026 年 3 月 5 日，OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4，定位为「首个大一统前沿模型」，提供三个版本：标准版、Thinking（推理增强）和 Pro（最高性能）。核心升级包括：原生计算机操控能力（OSWorld 得分 75%，超过人类基线 72.4%）、Tool Search 机制（按需查找工具定义，Agent 场景 token 消耗降低 47%）、1M token 上下文窗口（OpenAI 最大）。Thinking 版本会展示初始推理计划，用户可中途调整方向。标准版 API 定价 $2.50/$15 per 1M tokens（input/output），较 GPT-5.2 的 $1.75/$14 有所上调。GPT-5.2 Thinking 将于 2026 年 6 月 5 日下线。
On March 5, 2026, OpenAI released GPT-5.4 in three variants: standard, Thinking (reasoning-enhanced), and Pro (maximum performance). Key upgrades: native computer use (75% on OSWorld, surpassing the 72.4% human baseline), Tool Search (on-demand tool definition lookup, cutting agent token consumption by 47%), and 1M token context window (largest from OpenAI). The Thinking variant shows its reasoning plan upfront, allowing mid-process steering. Standard API pricing is $2.50/$15 per 1M tokens (input/output), up from GPT-5.2's $1.75/$14. GPT-5.2 Thinking will be deprecated on June 5, 2026.
关键指标
Key Metrics

Claude and Gemini benchmarks from their respective releases; GPT-5.4 benchmarks from OpenAI's official blog. Cross-model comparison may have methodology differences.

为什么重要
Why It Matters
这是 OpenAI 首次在单一模型中整合编码、推理、Agent 工作流和计算机操控四大能力，意味着开发者不再需要为不同任务切换模型。Tool Search 带来的 47% token 节省对构建复杂 Agent 系统的团队影响最大——如果你的应用注册了大量工具，调用成本将显著下降。OSWorld 超越人类基线意味着自动化 GUI 操作场景（RPA、测试自动化）进入实用阶段。但需注意，input 单价从 $1.75 上调至 $2.50（+43%），简单调用场景成本可能不降反升。
This is OpenAI's first model unifying coding, reasoning, agent workflows, and computer use, eliminating the need to route between specialized models. The 47% token savings from Tool Search matters most for teams building complex agent systems with many registered tools. Computer use surpassing human baselines on OSWorld signals that GUI automation (RPA, test automation) is entering production-ready territory. However, the 43% input price increase ($1.75 to $2.50) means simple API call patterns may see higher costs, not lower.
受影响群体
Who Is Affected
HIGH
AI Agent 开发者
Tool Search 机制大幅降低多工具 Agent 的 token 消耗；原生计算机操控能力开启新的自动化场景；需评估是否从 GPT-5.2 迁移
HIGH
个人开发者 / 独立开发者
统一模型降低了选型复杂度，一个 API 覆盖推理+编码+Agent；但 input 单价上涨 43%，需根据使用模式计算实际成本变化
MEDIUM
企业 AI 平台团队
GPT-5.2 Thinking 6月下线，需要制定迁移计划；Pro 版本高昂定价（$30/$180）适合高价值任务但需严格控制调用量
MEDIUM
RPA / 测试自动化团队
计算机操控超越人类基线，GUI 自动化场景从概念验证进入生产可用阶段
HIGH
AI Agent developers
Tool Search dramatically reduces token overhead for multi-tool agents; native computer use unlocks new automation capabilities; migration evaluation from GPT-5.2 is now necessary
HIGH
Solo / indie developers
Unified model simplifies selection -- one API for reasoning + coding + agents; but the 43% input price increase requires cost recalculation based on your usage pattern
MEDIUM
Enterprise AI platform teams
GPT-5.2 Thinking deprecation in June requires migration planning; Pro tier pricing ($30/$180) suits high-value tasks but demands strict call volume control
MEDIUM
RPA / test automation teams
Computer use exceeding human baseline moves GUI automation from proof-of-concept to production viability
你该做什么
What To Do
进度
0/0
Progress
0/0
立即行动
☐在 OpenAI Playground 用 GPT-5.4 跑你现有应用的典型 prompt，对比 GPT-5.2 的输出质量和 token 消耗
☐检查你的 Agent 系统注册了多少工具——如果超过 20 个，Tool Search 可能为你节省显著成本
☐查看 OpenAI 官方迁移指南，确认 GPT-5.2 Thinking 的下线时间表（2026-06-05）
本周内
☐用实际业务数据做 A/B 测试：GPT-5.4 标准版 vs GPT-5.2，计算 input 涨价后的总体成本变化
☐如果有 RPA 或 GUI 自动化需求，搭建概念验证评估原生计算机操控能力
☐评估 GPT-5.4 Thinking 的推理透明性是否满足你的合规或审计需求
观望等待
☐等待第三方独立 benchmark（如 LMSYS Chatbot Arena）验证实际表现，OpenAI 自测数据可能存在偏差
☐观察 Anthropic 和 Google 是否在未来数周内发布竞品回应
☐关注社区反馈中 GPT-5.4 在长上下文（>500K tokens）场景下的实际表现
Immediate
☐Run your existing prompts through GPT-5.4 in OpenAI Playground and compare output quality and token usage against GPT-5.2
☐Count how many tools your agent system registers -- if over 20, Tool Search likely saves you significant costs
☐Review the OpenAI migration guide and note the GPT-5.2 Thinking deprecation date (June 5, 2026)
This Week
☐A/B test with real production data: GPT-5.4 standard vs GPT-5.2, calculating total cost impact including the input price increase
☐If you have RPA or GUI automation needs, build a proof-of-concept using the native computer use capability
☐Evaluate whether GPT-5.4 Thinking's reasoning transparency meets your compliance or audit requirements
Watch & Wait
☐Wait for independent benchmarks (e.g., LMSYS Chatbot Arena) to validate real-world performance -- OpenAI's self-reported scores may be optimistic
☐Watch for competitive responses from Anthropic and Google in the coming weeks
☐Monitor community feedback on GPT-5.4's actual performance with long contexts (>500K tokens)
决策选项
Decision Options
立即迁移到 GPT-5.4
将现有 GPT-5.2 调用切换到 GPT-5.4，启用 Tool Search 优化
适合: Agent 工具数量多（>20）、需要计算机操控能力、或需要更强推理能力的团队 成本: input 单价上涨 43%（$1.75->$2.50），但 Tool Search 可抵消部分成本 风险: 新模型可能存在边缘场景 regression；已有 prompt 可能需要调优
混合部署策略
高价值任务用 GPT-5.4/Pro，简单任务继续用 GPT-5.2 或更便宜的模型
适合: 成本敏感且任务类型多样的团队 成本: 需要维护多模型路由逻辑的工程开销 风险: 模型行为差异可能导致用户体验不一致
等待竞品对比后再决定
等 1-2 周独立评测出炉，同时评估 Claude Opus 4.6 和 Gemini 3 Pro
适合: 不急于迁移、希望做充分选型对比的团队 成本: 时间成本；可能错过早期采用优势 风险: GPT-5.2 Thinking 将在 3 个月后下线，不宜拖太久
保持现状
继续使用 GPT-5.2/5.3 或其他模型，暂不迁移
适合: 当前方案运行良好、成本可控、且不需要计算机操控或 Tool Search 能力的团队 成本: 无额外成本 风险: GPT-5.2 Thinking 将于 2026-06-05 下线，需在此之前完成迁移规划
Migrate to GPT-5.4 now
Switch existing GPT-5.2 calls to GPT-5.4, enable Tool Search optimization
Suitable for: Teams with many agent tools (>20), needing computer use, or requiring stronger reasoning Cost: Input price rises 43% ($1.75 to $2.50), partially offset by Tool Search savings Risk: Edge-case regressions in new model; existing prompts may need tuning
Hybrid deployment
Use GPT-5.4/Pro for high-value tasks, keep GPT-5.2 or cheaper models for simple tasks
Suitable for: Cost-sensitive teams with diverse task types Cost: Engineering overhead to maintain multi-model routing logic Risk: Behavioral differences between models may cause inconsistent user experience
Wait for independent benchmarks
Defer migration 1-2 weeks until third-party evaluations are available; compare with Claude Opus 4.6 and Gemini 3 Pro
Suitable for: Teams not under time pressure who want thorough model selection Cost: Time cost; may miss early-adopter advantages Risk: GPT-5.2 Thinking sunsets in 3 months -- don't wait too long
Stay on current setup
Continue using GPT-5.2/5.3 or other models without migrating
Suitable for: Teams whose current solution works well and doesn't need computer use or Tool Search Cost: No additional cost Risk: GPT-5.2 Thinking will be deprecated on June 5, 2026 -- plan migration before then
风险与误区
Risks & Pitfalls
Input 涨价被忽视
47% 的 Agent 成本节省来自 Tool Search 减少 token 消耗，但 input 单价本身上涨了 43%。如果你的场景不涉及大量工具调用，实际成本可能不降反升。迁移前务必用真实流量做成本测算。
Benchmark 数据来自 OpenAI 自测
目前公布的 GDPval、OSWorld 等分数均来自 OpenAI 官方，尚无 LMSYS Arena 等独立第三方验证。历史上模型发布初期的自测数据与真实使用体验存在差距，不应仅凭 benchmark 做迁移决策。
急于全量迁移导致 regression
新模型在特定 prompt 模式或领域知识上可能存在退化。建议先在非关键路径上灰度测试，收集 1-2 周数据后再决定全量切换。
The 47% savings may not apply to your use case
The cost reduction comes from Tool Search reducing token consumption in multi-tool agent scenarios. Meanwhile, input pricing itself rose 43% ($1.75 to $2.50). If your application doesn't use many tools, your actual costs may increase. Always benchmark with real traffic before committing to migration.
Benchmarks are self-reported
All published GDPval, OSWorld, and other scores come from OpenAI. No independent verification (LMSYS Arena, etc.) is available yet. Historically, self-reported launch benchmarks have diverged from real-world performance. Do not make migration decisions based solely on these numbers.
Rushing a full migration may cause regressions
New models can regress on specific prompt patterns or domain knowledge areas. Run a canary deployment on non-critical paths for 1-2 weeks before switching production traffic.
